description_long: This is a single-story residential house complex surrounded by a dense arrangement of mature trees, providing significant shade and privacy. The house features a series of connected structures with pitched, gable-style roofs and multiple visible chimneys, suggesting several living units or a large family home. The exterior walls are primarily brick with some lighter-colored trim, and the windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern along the front and sides. The property is bordered by two intersecting roads, with a driveway and parking area visible on one side, and a fenced backyard or garden area at the rear. The main entryway is accentuated by a small porch with steps and a covered overhang, flanked by decorative columns. The overall setting suggests a suburban or urban neighborhood context, with the house serving as a central feature within a landscaped lot.
description: A single-story brick house complex with gable roofs, surrounded by mature trees and bordered by intersecting roads. Features a prominent entry porch, symmetrical windows, and a landscaped lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry porch, symmetrical window arrangement, and dense tree line along the street.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the full extent of the house, the driveway, and the backyard area with additional trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, fenced garden area, and parking space, with trees lining the property.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the driveway entrance, garage structure, and the continuous row of trees along the road.
attribute_entryway_design: Central porch with steps, covered overhang, and decorative columns
